description: Golden Master registry consumed by build-test-runner-service. Each entry maps a COBOL programId to an expected stdout fixture and records whether the fixture was produced by a true COBOL runtime (e.g. GnuCOBOL cobcrun) or hand-curated as a synthetic expected output. W0 entries are all synthetic; true GnuCOBOL re-execution will be added in a follow-up wave once the host CI image carries cobc.

entries.rationale: Hand-curated expected output. The W0 generator does not yet translate PERFORM/EVALUATE/IF/ADD, so a generated-Java run is expected to diverge until generator coverage extends past W0.
Hand-curated expected output. The W0 generator does not yet translate COMPUTE or DISPLAY of computed values, so generated-Java runs diverge by design at W0.
Hand-curated expected output. The W0 generator does not yet translate PERFORM/COMPUTE/ADD, so generated-Java runs diverge by design at W0.
